title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dunzo Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Dunzo Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo Capital India family as a Backend Developer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
